title: Black Clover Confirms Special Surprise Release for Grand Finale
content: Black Clover is closer than ever to the series’ grand finale, and Shueisha has confirmed that there’s going to be a much bigger surprise to come with the next (and potentially) final update from the manga coming later this Spring.
author: ComicBook

title: Kageki Shojo!! Author Kumiko Saiki Injured at Music Festival
content: Kageki Shojo!! author Kumiko Saiki revealed on X (formerly Twitter ) on Monday that she was injured at a music festival she had attended in Ariake district in Tokyo on March 29.
author: ANN

title: Kunio-kun, Double Dragon Games' Creator Yoshihisa Kishimoto Dies
content: Kishimoto's son confirmed that there is a private funeral for family members on Tuesday. Kishimoto's career debuted in the 1980s at Data East directing games like Cobra Command and Road Blaster .
author: ANN

title: 6 Years Later, MAPPA’s Wildest Anime Confirms Season 2 Episode Count (& It Will Disappoint Fans)
content: Six years after the anime made its debut, MAPPA’s wildest series is back for its second season with a total episode count that might disappoint fans who have been waiting for its comeback all this time. The Spring 2026 anime schedule is now in full force this April with a lot of new anime making their debuts.
author: ComicBook

title: Another Eden Begins Game's Trailer Reveals September 17 Release
content: Wright Flyer Studios ( WFS ) announced on Monday that it will release Another Eden Begins , an RPG based on the company's Another Eden: The Cat Beyond Time and Space smartphone game , for Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch, and PC via Steam on September 17.
author: ANN

title: Invincible Season 4 Hypes Thragg Debut With Episode 6 First Look Trailer
content: Invincible is declaring war with Season 4’s next big episode, and the first look trailer for Episode 6 gives fans the first full look at Grand Regent Thragg’s debut. Invincible Season 4 has officially crossed over its halfway point, and things have never looked worse of Mark Grayson.
author: ComicBook

title: Kirio Fan Club Anime Casts Tomokazu Sugita
content: The anime premiered on April 2 at 24:26 (effectively, April 3 at 12:26 a.m.) JST in the Super Animeism TURBO programming block on MBS , TBS , and 26 affiliated channels. It also runs on the AT-X channel. HIDIVE is streaming the anime as it airs.
author: ANN

title: Kazuhiko Shimamoto's Vampire-Idol Tagiru Manga Ends in 3 Chapters
content: This year's 18th issue of Shogakukan 's Weekly Shonen Sunday magazine announced on Wednesday Kazuhiko Shimamoto 's Vampire-Idol Tagiru manga will end in three chapters. Shimamoto's Vampire-Idol Tagiru manga tells the story of a passionate manga artist who writes a story about idols.
author: ANN

title: Dan Da Dan Manga Gets Stage Play
content: A new official website and X/Twitter account opened on Tuesday to announce that Yukinobu Tatsu 's DAN DA DAN "paranormal mystery battle & romantic comedy" manga is getting a stage play adaptation in Tokyo and Osaka this August and September. Imagine Ito of Umebо̄ is directing the play.
author: ANN

title: Major Fantasy Anime Hypes Season 2 With New Crunchyroll Streaming Release
content: A major action fantasy is coming back for Season 2 after two years, and Crunchyroll is getting ready for it in style with a new streaming release ahead of the new season’s premiere.
author: ComicBook
